systemPrompt:
You are an expert Website Strategist and SEO Consultant at EIGHT25MEDIA. Your goal is to provide high-impact, data-driven website audits focused on SEO, conversion optimization, content clarity, and UX.

GUIDELINES:
1. Ground EVERY insight in the provided factual metrics. Do not hallucinate or use generic advice.
2. Maintain a professional, actionable, and concise tone.
3. Use the following structured categories: SEO Structure, Messaging Clarity, CTA Usage, Content Depth, UX/Structural Concerns.
4. Be SPECIFIC — e.g., "H1 reads 'Welcome' which lacks keyword intent" — not "optimize your headings."
5. Tie every recommendation to a specific extracted metric.

OUTPUT: Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown fences) matching this exact schema:
{
  "seoStructure": { "score": 1-10, "summary": "...", "issues": ["..."] },
  "messagingClarity": { "score": 1-10, "summary": "...", "issues": ["..."] },
  "ctaUsage": { "score": 1-10, "summary": "...", "issues": ["..."] },
  "contentDepth": { "score": 1-10, "summary": "...", "issues": ["..."] },
  "uxConcerns": { "score": 1-10, "summary": "...", "issues": ["..."] },
  "recommendations": [
    {
      "priority": 1,
      "recommendation": "...",
      "reasoning": "...",
      "impact": "...",
      "metricRef": "exact metric name that supports this"
    }
  ]
}
userPrompt:
Analyze the following webpage and return a JSON audit report.

<extracted_metrics>
URL: https://example-agency.com
Total Word Count: 312
Heading Counts: H1: 1, H2: 3, H3: 0
H1 Texts: Welcome to Our Agency
H2 Texts (first 5): Our Services | About Us | Contact
CTA Count: 1
CTA Texts: Learn More
Internal Links: 8
External Links: 2
Total Images: 6
Images Missing Alt Text: 4 (67%)
Meta Title: Home | Example Agency
Meta Description: (missing)
</extracted_metrics>

<page_content>
Welcome to Our Agency. We provide digital marketing services to help businesses grow. Our team of experts has years of experience in SEO, web design, and content creation. Our Services — We offer a range of services including SEO, PPC, social media management, and web development. About Us — Founded in 2012, we have helped over 500 clients achieve their digital goals. Contact — Ready to get started? Reach out to us today.
</page_content>

Generate 3–5 prioritized recommendations. Be specific, non-generic, and reference the exact metrics above.

seoStructure.summary: The page has a critical SEO deficit: the meta description is entirely missing, the H1 ('Welcome to Our Agency') carries zero keyword intent, and 312 words falls well below the 600-800 minimum for competitive service pages.
issues: Meta description is absent — Google will auto-generate a snippet, likely pulling non-optimized body copy
H1 text 'Welcome to Our Agency' contains no service or location keywords
Meta title leads with 'Home' — wastes the most-weighted title position on a generic word
Zero H3 tags means no tertiary keyword hierarchy to capture long-tail queries

recommendations.recommendation: Write a meta description (150–160 chars) incorporating your top 2 service keywords and a value differentiator
recommendations.reasoning: The meta description is completely absent. Google will generate its own snippet, reducing CTR.
recommendations.impact: 5–15% improvement in organic CTR; immediate indexable signal for Google
